Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.

Section text:
## 在商业模式、玩法创新、体验纯粹性上的取舍与代价

message.content: This section contains only a heading and no body content. It signals a thematic focus on the strategic compromises and consequences involved in balancing business models, gameplay innovation, and experience purity. It can answer high-level conceptual questions regarding how commercial objectives, innovative mechanics, and experiential purity conflict or require trade-offs. No specific entities, dates, definitions, procedures, detailed claims, tables, figures, metrics, or evidence types are present in the provided text.
